title: Ubufasha n'inkunga
description: Turi hano kugirango dufashe ibibazo cyangwa ibibazo ushobora guhura nabyo mugihe ukoresha urubuga rwacu. Waba ukeneye ubufasha gutangira, gira ikibazo kijyanye nimiterere, cyangwa ushaka kumenyesha ikosa, turi hano kugirango dufashe.

contact.title: Inkunga
contact.emailDesc: Dufite intego yo gusubiza imeri zose mugihe cyamasaha 24.
contact.footer: Urakoze guhitamo porogaramu y'urubuga. Twiyemeje gukora uburambe bwawe neza kandi bushimishije bishoboka.

detailedFeatures.title: Inkunga irambuye
detailedFeatures.subtitle: Gucamo Ijwi ryinjiza hamwe na Text-to-Speech ubushobozi kuri buri gikoresho.
